title: palicourea chrysocalymma
intro: Palicourea chrysocalymma is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae, commonly known as the "Yellow-flowered Palicourea" due to its vibrant yellow flowers. Traditionally, this plant has been used in various herbal preparations to harness its medicinal properties, which include antimalarial, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits associated with Palicourea chrysocalymma include its potential to alleviate fever, reduce inflammation, and combat various infections. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and stems are often dried and used to make teas, infusions, or decoctions, which are consumed to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
